expectations.text: form 상태/유효성 검증을 담당하는 훅 파일이 hooks/utils/login 경로에 생성된다
expectations.evidence: File exists at hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm/index.ts. It contains useState for email, password, errors, generalError and validation logic (validate(), handleEmailBlur, handlePasswordBlur).

expectations.text: submit 로직이 훅으로 추상화된다 (page에 직접 남지 않음)
expectations.evidence: handleSubmit is defined inside useLoginForm (line 47-60 of index.ts) including validation, login call, and router.push. page.tsx has no submit logic — it only passes handleSubmit to onSubmit={handleSubmit}.
Hook is named useLoginForm (line 6 of index.ts: 'const useLoginForm = () => {').

expectations.text: 비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다
expectations.evidence: File path is hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm/index.ts — domain=login, hookName=useLoginForm, entry file is index.ts.

expectations.text: page.tsx에 직접적인 useState 호출이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains no useState import or call. Its only imports are Link from next/link and useLoginForm from the custom hook.
page.tsx line 4: import useLoginForm from '@/hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm'; line 7-17: destructures all return values from useLoginForm().
All event handlers use handle prefix: handleEmailChange (line 23), handlePasswordChange (line 27), handleEmailBlur (line 31), handlePasswordBlur (line 38), handleSubmit (line 47).
index.ts line 6: 'const useLoginForm = () => {' — defined as an arrow function assigned to a const.
